summary: Frontend-only testing of Circuit & Ink static landing page. All major sections render correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports. Scroll reveal animations work. Contact links are functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid='footer' on <footer> element (no footer data-testid found)
data-testid is 'hero-logo' not 'company-logo' as expected by tests

issues: Dark background with white/light text - good contrast
Responsive layout works well on mobile 390px

action_items: Consider adding alias data-testid attributes: 'company-logo', 'cta-phone', 'cta-email', 'contact-section' OR update test expectations to use actual testids
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid naming inconsistency: hero-logo vs company-logo, hero-cta-call/hero-cta-email vs cta-phone/cta-email, contact-card vs contact-section, missing footer testid
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static landing page, no backend. All content renders. Minor: footer missing data-testid, some testid names differ from expected. Phone links to tel:+5927143159, email to mailto:support@circuitink.tech. Both CTA buttons present and functional. 3 service cards render. About, contact sections visible. Mobile responsive.
